q1_question: What agent loop patterns does Claude Code use (parallel tool execution, safety model, abort handling, context management, delivery/commit flow, stuck detection) that WorkRail's daemon AgentLoop should adopt or adapt?
q3_beliefs: WorkRail's AgentLoop is sequential-only for tool execution; Claude Code likely supports parallel tool execution with some safety classification; Claude Code likely has sophisticated context compaction; stuck detection in Claude Code may use more signals than WorkRail's repeated_tool_call heuristic; delivery/commit flow in WorkRail's daemon is a known gap (B1+B6)
q4_good_enough: Specific, actionable patterns with code-level detail: data structures, algorithm descriptions, safety classifications, and concrete adoption recommendations for each of the 7 key questions
q5_out_of_scope: Claude Code non-agent features (file editing UI, etc.)
General LLM API usage patterns not specific to agent loop
q6_source_preferences: GitHub repo https://github.com/codeaashu/claude-code and Reddit megathread https://www.reddit.com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1s9d9j9/claude_code_source_leak_megathread/
